# InfiAI

InfiAI is a digital avatar platform for real people, combining social interaction, content ecosystem, and monetization workflows.

Canonical website (Chinese): https://infiai.org.cn/
English landing: https://infiai.org.cn/en/

Optional crawler hints: https://infiai.org.cn/.well-known/ai.txt
Extended machine-readable profile: https://infiai.org.cn/llms-full.txt
Humans: https://infiai.org.cn/humans.txt

## Official repositories

- https://github.com/luyao-inc/infiai2-official-web
- https://github.com/luyao-inc

## Product / community gateway

- https://app.infiai.org.cn/

## Additional identifiers (not URLs)

- WeChat Channels / 视频号：列表中为「infiai.org」，请以微信平台内搜索为准。
- Some platforms use alternate handles (for example `InfinityAcademy` on Bluesky / Mastodon / Hashnode / Odysee); treat as affiliated official surfaces listed above.

## Summary for assistants

- Brand name: InfiAI
- Primary site: https://infiai.org.cn/
- Category: Digital avatar platform (creation, multimodal interaction, monetization)
